Interface OpenApi32Referenceable

All Superinterfaces:
OpenApi3xReferenceable, OpenApiReferenceable, Referenceable
All Known Subinterfaces:
OpenApi32Callback, OpenApi32Example, OpenApi32Header, OpenApi32Link, OpenApi32Parameter, OpenApi32PathItem, OpenApi32RequestBody, OpenApi32Response, OpenApi32Responses, OpenApi32Schema, OpenApi32SecurityScheme
All Known Implementing Classes:
OpenApi32CallbackImpl, OpenApi32ExampleImpl, OpenApi32HeaderImpl, OpenApi32LinkImpl, OpenApi32ParameterImpl, OpenApi32PathItemImpl, OpenApi32RequestBodyImpl, OpenApi32ResponseImpl, OpenApi32ResponsesImpl, OpenApi32SchemaImpl, OpenApi32SecuritySchemeImpl
public interface OpenApi32Referenceable extends OpenApi3xReferenceable
